content: Elena mentioned that she works as a software engineer at a tech startup in Austin, Texas. She's been there for about three years now.
Elena talked about her golden retriever Max. She adopted him two years ago from a local shelter and they go hiking together on weekends at Barton Creek Greenbelt.
Elena shared that she studied Computer Science at UT Austin and graduated in 2014. She's proud of being a Longhorn.
Elena said her favorite food is pasta carbonara. She learned to make it from scratch during a trip to Rome last summer. She loves cooking Italian food in general.
Elena mentioned she's really into indie rock music. Her favorite band is The National, and she recently went to their concert at ACL Live.
Elena talked about her weekend plans: she wants to hike at Enchanted Rock State Natural Area and try a new science fiction book by Adrian Tchaikovsky.
Elena is 34 years old and lives in a small apartment in the East Austin neighborhood. She's been thinking about buying a house nearby.
Elena mentioned she prefers working from home most days. Her company allows a hybrid schedule — she goes to the office on Tuesdays and Thursdays.
